steps.title: Use both quantities
steps.content: The student wants to contrast meteorite falls with meteorite finds. The relevant notes give both quantities: about 1,200 recorded falls and over 60,000 recorded finds. A strong answer must place those numbers side by side.

steps.title: Reject definitions alone
steps.content:
• Choice A: It defines the two categories but gives no numerical contrast.
  • Choice B: It names the categories but omits the counts.
  • Choice C: It gives only the number of falls, so it cannot contrast falls with finds.
The answer is D.
